business_ideas.idea: Employee tracking software like Hubstaff monitoring remote worker productivity at scale
Mouse jigglers and undetectable device movers to fake activity for remote workers
Community platform (Discord) around overemployed lifestyle with paid membership tier
Bring back jingles in modern advertising using repetition and earworm psychology
Free web-based alternatives to expensive software (Photopea for Photoshop, Pikimov for After Effects)
Prediction markets (Polymarket) as embedded media widget replacing traditional polls
Netflix shows as twenty-hour infomercials for your core business (Ryan Serhant model)
Corporate slang and phrases to create unique company culture and brand identity

predictions.text: Jingles will make a comeback as marketing fashion cycles and nostalgia drives brand recall
Prediction markets will replace traditional polling for elections and major events within five years
Indie hackers building one-person niche software will continue to thrive and find product-market fit
Self-driving cars will reduce traffic accidents by ninety percent and transform parking and car ownership
